dialogos.texto_en: Five years later%p-2;――
Welcome%p-2;――
Oh, it's you guys.
It's been a while, Ichika.
It's good to see you guys. \nAnd you're in a good shape as well.
And I see the shop is obviously bursting at the seams with customers.
Oh my, as expected of a top actress,\nyou're skilled at telling jokes.
Ohh, how nice.\nI'm actually happy to have this kind of exchange\nafter such a long time.
You've been in Tokyo all this time, Ichika.\nWhen was the last time we were all together?
Not everyone is here yet, right?\nWhat about Yotsuba?
She didn't say she'd be late,\nso she should be here soon.\nWould you like something to eat until then?
Yeah, I'll have something.
I'll have something light too.\nThen, I'll go with the chef's recommendation, pleaaase.
Hmph, I wonder if it will suit the taste of someone\nwho only goes around trendy cafes in Tokyo.
Huh? Did I tell you I go cafe hopping?
Nino is always keeping an eye your social media, Ichika.
Miku! Don't say that!
But I also tend to check it, out of concern.
Concern? Why?
Well, you know, if by any chance,\nUesugi-kun appears in a picture that's been uploaded,\nit could become a big problem, don't you think?
Ahh, I see.
It's okay, I'm being extremely careful.\nAnd as always Itsuki-chan worries about everything.
You worry about Ichika\nthe same way you'd be worrying about your students,\nright? As expected of a teacher.
That's not the case.
But really, Ichika, please be careful.\nIf you cause a scandal,\nthe media might come to this shop too.
If that happens, it'd be a nuisance\nto the regulars who just started to settle in.
I feel bad for your father-in-law as he is lending us\nthis well-equipped place.
I know that.\nI won't let your efforts go to waste.
But Nino, you're more worried about Ichika\nthan your shop, right?
MIIIKUUU!\nThat's enough already!
Heeey everyone!
Ah, Ichika!\nYou're already here! It's been a while!
Sure has, Yotsuba.
Thank goodness!\nYou looked super busy,\nso I was worried you might be late.
Nah, I wouldn't be late for my own wedding.
But really, Ichika, you seem really busy.
Yeah, thanks to everyone.
I see your face whenever I turn the TV on.\nThere are hardly any days when I don't see you.
That's probably because you're checking out\nthe shows I'm on.
But I have to work very hard to appear on the TV almost \nevery day.
You say that, but what about Fu-kun?\nAre you able to see each other?
Of course we are.
Well, lately the locations I need to go to are very far away\nand it's very hard to spend some time together.
I was working on another location in this region and I barely\nmade it back on time.
Oh really?!\nThat must have been tough.
Do you feel lonely if you have to work all day?
I talk to him on the phone every day and as long as I hear his\nvoice I don't feel lonely at all.
Plus, I really enjoy my work,\nso I'm very fulfilled right now.
But kissing scenes are a no-go, right?
Well, yeah.\nThat's what I told the agency a while ago.
Will they be allowed after today?
Hm...
Futaro would get jealous,\nso it's probably not a good idea.
Well, isn't that nice for you big actress.
Ahaha...
Oh, by the way, my makeup artist is coming today.
Does that mean you're really doing it?
Yep. I am.
Uesugi-kun needs to confirm it.
Okay, shall we go?\nThere's a lot of preparation to do.
Wait a minute.
Hm?
We want to give these to you.
Mom's heirloom earrings...
Yes. I've kept them for this occasion.
This is our wedding present to you.
Alright, here we go.\nOne, two, three%p-2;――
Ichika, congratulations on getting married!
Thank you, everyone.
Oh, no...\nI think I'm gonna cry.
It's still too early for that.
Ahaha, you're right.\nWe have to save it for the real thing.
To be honest, we were also planning to\nget your ears pierced for you as a gift%p-2;――
Sorry about that.\nTurns out I already have both of them pierced.
Aww, that's too bad.\nWe were looking forward to it.
Those are some scary smiles...
Anyway, it's about time%p-2;――
Shall we get going, everyone?
